response.justification: Over 15 years of hands-on fullstack experience with a strong recent record in the role's core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production at Optilyz and re:cinq — plus direct AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which is an explicitly required and rare skill. Deep testing culture (TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks, taught testing courses) and Docker/Kubernetes/AWS experience round out the requirements; the main gaps are Nest.js and Kotlin, which are learnable given the breadth shown.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js/React production experience matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work, a required skill few candidates have
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, test-framework author, CI/CD, Kubernetes)
concerns: Kotlin absent and Java exposure appears dated/limited
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named directly, though testing depth suggests fast ramp-up
